title: Join on two rtree tables malfunctions
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE rt2 (c0 VARCHAR, a FLOAT, b FLOAT);
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE rt3 (c0 INTEGER, a FLOAT, b FLOAT);
SELECT * FROM rt2, rt3 WHERE rt2.c0 = CAST(rt3.c0 AS VARCHAR);
key_bug_features: Join on rtree tables with mismatched types
